title: grewia eriocarpa
intro: Grewia eriocarpa, also known as the hairy clusterberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Grewia eriocarpa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy in many cultures. Grewia eriocarpa is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is typically consumed as a tea or added to various herbal formulations.
